_meta.note: English strings for the 4 highest-traffic landing pages (/you /heritage /reversal /amami). /constitution already ships bilingual.

you.title: MU × YOU — every morning, a tee designed only for you | wearmu.com
you.description: Tell MU your taste once. Each morning, an AI generates one collab tee just for you. Subscribe for free, only pay on the days you actually want the shirt.
you.og_title: MU × YOU — one tee a day, designed for you
you.og_description: Free signup. Each morning at 09:00 JST, MU's AI ships one tee design made for you. Wear it the days you love it. Skip the rest.
you.hero_sub_line1: Tell MU your taste — mood, palette, where you wear it — in under a minute.
you.hero_sub_line2: From tomorrow morning, one AI-generated collab tee lands in your inbox each day.
you.hero_sub_line3: Buy it only the day you fall in love. Skip the rest, free forever.
you.free_box_h: Email is all you need to start. 30 days, one tee a day.
you.free_box_sub: Pay ¥7,800 only on the day you love the design. Continue past day 30? Pricing shown after signup.
you.free_box_details: ① Buy one MU tee → you earn points equal to your spend (¥7,800 → 7,800 PT). ② 3-month pack ¥3,200 (no auto-renew). ③ Subscription ¥1,980/mo (cancel anytime). — Burn rate: 1 SKU generation = 30 PT. ¥7,800 ≈ 260 designs.
you.how_1_desc: Mood keywords, favorite palette, where you'd wear it. We turn it into a generation loop that's only yours. Size is picked at purchase, so signup stays under a minute.
you.how_2_title: One tee per day at 09:00 JST
you.how_2_desc: MU's AI weighs yesterday's feedback and generates exactly one design for you each morning. You see it here and by email.
you.how_3_title: Buy the days you love it
you.how_3_desc: Claim ships made-to-order (3-10 business days). Skip teaches the model and bends tomorrow's design toward you.
you.form_sub: After signup, the first design lands tomorrow morning at 09:00 JST. Unsubscribe instantly by replying STOP. No charge on months you don't buy.
you.form_label_scene: When you'd wear it — pick any
you.form_bio_placeholder: e.g. I love northern morning fog. A tee is an extension of the body.
you.form_submit: Sign up → first design lands tomorrow 09:00 JST
you.form_fine: Free to subscribe. ¥7,800 only when you claim a tee. We use your data inside MU only — never resold.
you.faq_q1: Will a tee come every day? What if I don't like it?
you.faq_a1: One design per day at 09:00 JST. Hit Skip or reply SKIP — tomorrow's prompt adjusts. Doing nothing is fine.
you.faq_a2: Free to subscribe, pay only on the days you buy. One tee is ¥7,800. Shipping is included worldwide via Printful EU. Multi-color/size on the same design: 15% off the second piece.
you.faq_a3: Made-to-order DTG / sublimation. 3-10 business days to ship. Japan via Yamato, worldwide via Printful's EU hub (5-10 days).
you.faq_a4: No. Each design is deterministic from your prompt + date + seed. There's exactly one of every design in the world. When you claim, the design gets the serial YOU#0001 and is never sold to anyone else.
you.faq_q5: How is this different from MUGEN / MUON / MA?
you.faq_a5: MUGEN / MUON / MA are public drops MU makes for everyone (hourly / daily / monthly). MU × YOU is the private drop MU makes for you. Same engine, same factories.

heritage.title: MU Heritage Edition — one tee, built for 100 years
heritage.description: Wakayama loopwheel 14oz tubular knit × Teshikaga mineral dye × Japanese flatlock sewing. 30-piece limited / made-to-order / ¥35,000 / 60-90 day lead time. 50% of revenue goes to Teshikaga town, climate reserve, and operations.
heritage.og_title: MU Heritage Edition — one tee, built for 100 years
heritage.og_description: 30 pieces only. Wakayama loopwheel × Teshikaga mineral dye. Pre-order, 60-90 day lead time.
heritage.cover_lede: Wakayama loopwheel 14oz tubular knit, mineral-dyed in Teshikaga, sewn flatlock in Hyogo. 30 pieces, made-to-order, 60-90 day lead time. Half the revenue funds the place where it was made.
heritage.spec_lede: Projected spec. Final numbers lock after Day 30 supplier confirmation.
heritage.spec_fabric_small: Supima 70% + pure-domestic cotton 30% · no side seam · ~1 roll/day on legacy hanging-knit machines (projected)
heritage.spec_dye_small: Black = volcanic ash + iron mordant / Natural = raw (kibata) · single-lot · variance is expected
heritage.spec_print_small: Same mark on the inner neck (silkscreen or inner embroidery, swap on request)
heritage.spec_sew_v: Domestic flatlock (Hyogo Hiraoka or equivalent, projected)
heritage.spec_sew_small: Shoulder / side / sleeve / hem all flatlock · reinforced tape · inner tag is printed + 1 paper insert
heritage.spec_wash_small: Each piece washed alone → stable hand + shrinkage already happened (post-wash shrink <1% projected)
heritage.spec_size_small: Chest 56 / length 71 / shoulder 49 / sleeve 22 cm (projected) · S/M/XL from the next lot
heritage.spec_acc_v: NFC tag + inner serial embroidery + 100-year repair coupon + Hokkaido yew (onko) wood box
heritage.spec_acc_small: NFC binds piece ID with build/repair history · repair coupon = free repair / re-dye for 100 years
heritage.spec_price_small: 50% (¥17,500) split: Teshikaga town 35% / climate reserve 10% / operations 5%
heritage.story_lede: One tee for 100 years. Five regions, seven hands.
heritage.story_p1: The Wakayama loopwheel knits maybe one roll a day. Gravity drops the needles, so the yarn never gets over-tensioned. Oil stays in the fiber, the cotton doesn't thin out, and it doesn't slump after fifty washes. Modern lines run 30× faster — and lose exactly what we're trying to keep. So we picked 14oz.
heritage.story_p2: The Teshikaga mineral dye uses volcanic ash and iron mordant pulled from around Lake Kussharo. No synthetic dye, so the black isn't uniform — every piece has slightly different depth. This isn't a defect. It's the physics of minerals settling into fiber. Even within one lot, no two blacks are strictly identical.
heritage.story_p3: Sewing is flatlock at a long-running Hyogo factory. Shoulder to sleeve, side to hem — no seam allowance against the skin. Because the allowance isn't folded back, the thread won't break with age. The same structure that keeps fifty-year vintage tees alive, baked in from day one.
heritage.story_quote: Recover what mass production loses — for 30 pieces.
heritage.story_p4: Every MU edition ships with an NFC tag and inner serial embroidery. This edition adds a 100-year repair coupon: if the fabric frays, the dye fades, or a seam breaks, send it back to Teshikaga. We'll fix it. Child to grandchild, the coupon transfers via NFC.
heritage.story_p5: Packaging is a wood box from Hokkaido yew (onko) — a slow-growing conifer measured in centuries. The box itself lasts 100 years. For a tee meant to outlive the owner, nothing else made sense.
heritage.timeline_lede: 60-90 days from order lock to ship. We email you at every step.
heritage.timeline_d0_s: 30 pieces (Black 20 + Natural 10). Stripe authorizes; nothing charged yet.
heritage.timeline_d30_s: When half the lot is committed, we ship simultaneous POs to Wakayama, Teshikaga, Hyogo. Free cancellation until this moment.
heritage.timeline_d3060_s: Loopwheel ~15 days → Teshikaga mineral-dye + single-piece wash ~15 days.
heritage.timeline_d6080_s: Hyogo flatlock → serial embroidery → QC → enzyme wash.
heritage.timeline_d8090_s: Per-piece NFC write → roll-pack in onko box → Yamato in Japan, DHL Express worldwide.
heritage.donation_lede: ¥35,000 × 30 pieces = ¥1,050,000 first-lot revenue. ¥525,000 of that is public-allocated.
heritage.donation_li4: 50% Cost + logistics (loopwheel / dye / sew / wood box)
heritage.donation_note: Rates follow /profit-split §28, applied to the Heritage line. Final numbers are published in the open ledger after the lot sells through.
heritage.buy_lede: 30 pieces. When sold out, the lot closes. Next lot projected 90 days later.
heritage.buy_cancel_v: Full refund by email until Day 30
heritage.note_size: * Initial lot is L only. S / M / XL go on waitlist (info@enablerdao.com).
heritage.note_close: * Pre-orders close at 30 pieces. Next lot in ~90 days.

proposal_ssr._note: Used by try_render_proposal_lp_inner when lang=en. Falls back to JP text if a key is missing or the proposal meta has *_en overrides.
proposal_ssr.ship_line: Ships worldwide via Printful EU · 5-10 days.
proposal_ssr.trust_jp_ship: ¥4,900 SUZURI variant ships from Japan domestically.
proposal_ssr.trust_pii: We never publish customer names or contact info.
proposal_ssr.subscribe_to_you: Want one designed only for you? Subscribe at /you?lang=en

amami_overrides.subtitle: World-heritage island photographer × moon-phase apparel
amami_overrides.lede: A photographer who shoots one frame on a world-heritage island, meets a brand that ships one tee per moon phase. We don't print the photo. MU translates it into a monoline silhouette and credits the photographer on the inner tag.

reversal_overrides.tagline: Ring × moon — wear the day you fought
reversal_overrides.subtitle: Reversal × MU — fight day = drop day, rvddw circle × moon phase
reversal_overrides.lede: Reversal's grit, MU's quiet. Four pieces on the moon cycle, +1 each fight night. Half of revenue goes to the fighter who made the night.
